zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Grosvenor於1430年出生在英國爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德時，她的父親Ralph Grosvenor23歲，母親Joan Fitton31歲。她於1464年與Peter Dutton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特赫爾姆享年73歲，埋葬在英國爾瓦維頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Grosvenor于1430年出生在英国爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德时，她的父亲Ralph Grosvenor23岁，母亲Joan Fitton31岁。她于1464年与Peter Dutton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1503年在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特赫爾姆享年73岁，埋葬在英国爾瓦維頓。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Grosvenor was born in 1430, in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England, her father, Ralph Grosvenor, was 23 and her mother, Joan Fitton, was 31. She married Peter Dutton in 1464, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1503, in Hulme, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Waverton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Grosvenor est née en 1430, à Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Grosvenor, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Fitton, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Peter Dutton en 1464, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1503, à Hulme, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Grosvenorが1430年にイギリスチェシュアイアハルメ ワルフィールドで生まれた時，父Ralph Grosvenorは23歳，母Joan Fittonは31歳であった。1464年にイギリスチェシュアイアでPeter Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年にイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターハルメで73歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアワバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Grosvenor(이)가 1430년 영국 체실르 훌 월필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Grosvenor(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Fitton(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1464년 영국 체실르에서 Peter Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 훌에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 와버턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Peter Dutton em 1464, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Grosvenor родилась в 1430 г. в местности хулм валфиелд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Grosvenor было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitton, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Dutton в 1464 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1503 г. в местности хулм, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия.
